raw_text:

{
  "claims": [
    "The OC Health Agency announced expedited testing for first responders.",
    "The Anaheim Convention Center can serve more than 1,000 people daily for COVID-19 testing.",
    "Accelerated test results enable quick identification of COVID-19 cases.",
    "Quick treatment for COVID-19 cases is facilitated by expedited testing.",
    "Early testing helps to identify anyone who came into contact with infected people.",
    "The CDC has guidance on two kinds of COVID-19 tests: viral tests and antibody tests.",
    "A viral test tells if a person has a current COVID-19 infection.",
    "An antibody test might tell if a person had a past COVID-19 infection, but not necessarily a current infection."
